---
title: "Response across visits by analyte and antigen"
subtitle: "Separately by untransformed and standardized"
author: "Scot Zens"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    theme: cosmo
    highlight: textmate
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
## workflowr::wflow_build(files = here("./analysis/response_volcanos_matpm_v3.Rmd"))
library(data.table) # for the function in the R/C0_connection_transform.R code
library(tidyverse)  # for dplyr, ggplot2, forcats, tidyr, stringr, tibble, and magrittr pipe
library(here)       # for here::here used in file paths
library(reshape2)   # for reshape2::pivot_wider 
library(RColorBrewer) # for brewer.pal color palettes

volcano_plot_arm_effect <- function(data = NULL, effect_label = c("Lower TdaP", "Higher TdaP")) {
    
  cutoff_padj <- 0.05
  cutoff_log <- -log10(cutoff_padj)
  
  if(length(effect_label) != 2) stop("effect_label must be length 2 (one for each arm_name)")
  
  data <- dplyr::mutate(data,
                        antigen_analyte = paste(antigen, analyte, sep = "_"),
                        arm_name = factor(arm_name))
  
  arms <- c("TT","TdaP")
  if(length(arms) != 2) stop("arm_name must have exactly two levels.")
  
  # We'll define effect_size = median(mTdaP) - median(mTT)
  # So arms[?] must correspond to mTT or mTdaP - confirm and reorder if needed
  # We want arms in order: c("mTT", "mTdaP"), then effect_size = median(mTdaP) - median(mTT)
  
  # Reorder arm_name levels to have mTT first then mTdaP second, for consistency
  # If this is not the case in data, reorder
  desired_levels <- c("TT", "TdaP")
  if(!all(desired_levels %in% arms)) stop("arm_name must contain 'TT' and 'TdaP'")
  data$arm_name <- factor(data$arm_name, levels = desired_levels)
  arms <- levels(data$arm_name) # updated
  
  results <- data %>%
    dplyr::group_by(antigen_analyte, analyte) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(
      median_1 = median(log_assay_value[arm_name == arms[1]], na.rm = TRUE), # mTT
      median_2 = median(log_assay_value[arm_name == arms[2]], na.rm = TRUE), # mTdaP
      effect_size = median_2 - median_1,  # positive effect = higher mTdaP
      wilcox_test = list(stats::wilcox.test(log_assay_value ~ arm_name)),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      p_value = purrr::map_dbl(wilcox_test, ~.$p.value)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-wilcox_test)
  
  # results <- results %>%
  #   dplyr::mutate(
  #     p_adj = stats::p.adjust(p_value, method = "bonferroni"),
  #     neg_log10_p_adj = -log10(p_adj),
  #     label = antigen_analyte,
  #     
  #     # Now effect_label[2] = "Higher mTdaP" corresponds to effect_size > 0
  #     # Reverse assignment from before
  #     direction_label = ifelse(effect_size > 0, effect_label[2], effect_label[1])
  #   )
  results <- results %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    p_adj = stats::p.adjust(p_value, method = "bonferroni"),
    neg_log10_p_adj = -log10(p_adj),
    label = antigen_analyte,
    direction_label = ifelse(effect_size > 0, effect_label[2], effect_label[1]),
    label_to_show = ifelse(p_adj <= cutoff_padj, antigen_analyte, NA_character_)  # Label only significant points
  )
  
  plot_results <- results

  
  # p <- ggplot2::ggplot(results,
  #                      ggplot2::aes(x = effect_size,
  #                                   y = neg_log10_p_adj,
  #                                   color = analyte)) +
  #   ggplot2::geom_point(shape = 16) +
  #   ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = cutoff_log, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  #   ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  #   ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
  #     ggplot2::aes(label = label, color = analyte),
  #     box.padding = 0.4,
  #     max.overlaps = 5,
  #     segment.color = "grey50",
  #     segment.size = 0.5,
  #     point.padding = 0.25,
  #     show.legend = FALSE
  #   ) +
    
p <- ggplot2::ggplot(results,
                     ggplot2::aes(x = effect_size,
                                  y = neg_log10_p_adj,
                                  color = analyte)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(shape = 16) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = cutoff_log, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    ggplot2::aes(label = label_to_show, color = analyte),  # use label_to_show for selective labeling
    box.padding = 0.4,
    max.overlaps = Inf,                # optional: allow many labels, if desired
    segment.color = "grey50",
    segment.size = 0.5,
    point.padding = 0.25,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = "Effect size (Median log assay value difference: TdaP - TT)",
      y = expression(-log[10] ~ "Bonferroni adjusted p-value"),
      title = "Maternal vaccination effects on serology response",
      color = "Analyte",
      caption = paste(
        "Wilcoxon rank sum test per antigen-analyte comparing arm_name (TT vs TdaP).\n",
        "Effect size is median(TdaP) - median(TT), so positive values indicate higher response in TdaP.\n",
        "P-values adjusted with Bonferroni correction.\n",
        "Dashed lines represent zero effect size and significance cutoff at 0.05."
      )
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
    ggplot2::theme(plot.caption = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0))
  
  return(p)
}

#### set options
options(useFancyQuotes = FALSE)

manu <- "Responses across visits"
# selected_maternal_arm <- selected_maternal_arm <- "TdaP"
# selected_maternal_arm <- selected_maternal_arm <- "TT"
marm_list <- as.vector(c("mTdaP", "mTT"))
iarm_list <- as.vector(c("aP", "wP"))

#### load colors
source(here("./code/colors.R"), local = TRUE)
iarm.apwps.color <- c('aP' = "dodgerblue2",'wP' = "forestgreen")
marm.apwps.color <- c('mTdaP' = "skyblue",'mTT' = "salmon")

color.Welch.fill <- brewer.pal(3, "YlGn")[2]

covariate.colors <- c(
  "arm_name" = "tomato",
  "birth_weight" = "lightblue",
  "infant_sex" = "forestgreen",
  "delivery_mode" = "#9467bd",
  "parity" = "#8c564b",
  "gravidity" = "firebrick",
  "gestational_age_vaccination" = "darkorange",
  "vaccine_birth_interval_days" = "steelblue",
  "gestational_age_birth" = "mediumseagreen",
  "maternal_age" = "salmon",
  # "log_igg_t0" = "#AF8DC3",
  "Residual" = "yellow",
  "DT_IgGt0" = "#23AECE",
  "FHA_IgGt0" = "#C51B7D", 
  "PRN_IgGt0" = "#FEE08B", 
  "PT_IgGt0" = "#5EA4A2", 
  "TT_IgGt0" = "#E04C5C"
)

antigen.colors <- c(
  "zmixture" = "firebrick",
  "zPC1" = "salmon",
  "zPC2" = "#E04C5C",
  "DT" = "#FEE08B",
  "FHA" = "#23AECE",
  "PRN" = "steelblue",
  "PT" = "#AF8DC3",
  "TT" = "mediumseagreen" 
)

#### load boxplot and confounder adjustment functions
# source(here("./code/boxplot_functions.R"), local = TRUE)
# source(here("./code/forestplot_functions.R"), local = TRUE)
# source(here("./code/dim_reduc_functions.R"), local = TRUE)
source(shared_utils("R/C0_connection_transform.R"), local = TRUE)
# source(here("./code/cluster_functions_b.R"), local = TRUE)

include_feature <- c("DT_IgG","DT_IgG1","DT_IgG2","DT_IgG3","DT_IgG4","DT_ADCD","DT_ADNP","DT_ADCP","DT_FcgR2a","DT_FcgR3b",
      "TT_IgG","TT_IgG1","TT_IgG2","TT_IgG3","TT_IgG4","TT_ADCD","TT_ADNP","TT_ADCP","TT_FcgR2a","TT_FcgR3b",
      "PT_IgG","PT_IgG1","PT_IgG2","PT_IgG3","PT_IgG4","PT_ADCD","PT_ADNP","PT_ADCP","PT_FcgR2a","PT_FcgR3b",
      "FHA_IgG","FHA_IgG1","FHA_IgG2","FHA_IgG3","FHA_IgG4","FHA_ADCD","FHA_ADNP","FHA_ADCP","FHA_FcgR2a","FHA_FcgR3b",
      "PRN_IgG","PRN_IgG1","PRN_IgG2","PRN_IgG3","PRN_IgG4","PRN_ADCD","PRN_ADNP","PRN_ADCP","PRN_FcgR2a","PRN_FcgR3b")

include_feature_wo <- c("DT_IgG1","DT_IgG2","DT_IgG3","DT_IgG4","DT_ADCD","DT_ADNP","DT_ADCP","DT_FcgR2a","DT_FcgR3b",
      "TT_IgG1","TT_IgG2","TT_IgG3","TT_IgG4","TT_ADCD","TT_ADNP","TT_ADCP","TT_FcgR2a","TT_FcgR3b",
      "PT_IgG1","PT_IgG2","PT_IgG3","PT_IgG4","PT_ADCD","PT_ADNP","PT_ADCP","PT_FcgR2a","PT_FcgR3b",
      "FHA_IgG1","FHA_IgG2","FHA_IgG3","FHA_IgG4","FHA_ADCD","FHA_ADNP","FHA_ADCP","FHA_FcgR2a","FHA_FcgR3b",
      "PRN_IgG1","PRN_IgG2","PRN_IgG3","PRN_IgG4","PRN_ADCD","PRN_ADNP","PRN_ADCP","PRN_FcgR2a","PRN_FcgR3b")

### select covariates, set time points for difference and fold-change, name variables
covariates <- c("birth_weight", "infant_sex", "delivery_mode", "parity", "gravidity", "gestational_age_vaccination", "vaccine_birth_interval_days", "gestational_age_birth", 
"maternal_age", "log_igg_t0")

covariates_named_list <- list(
  "Arm Name" = "arm_name",
  "Birth Weight" = "birth_weight",
  "Infant Sex" = "infant_sex",
  "Delivery Mode" = "delivery_mode",
  "Parity" = "parity",
  # "Gravidity" = "gravidity",
  "Gestational Age at Vaccine" = "gestational_age_vaccination",
  "Infant Interval Between Vaccination and Delivery Days" = "vaccine_birth_interval_days",
  "Gestational Age at Delivery" = "gestational_age_birth",
  "Maternal Age at Vaccination" = "maternal_age",
  "Maternal BMI at Vaccination" = "maternal_bmi",
  "Maternal hemoglobin" = "maternal_Hb"
  # "Baseline IgG" = "log_igg_t0",
  # "Baseline DT IgG" = "DT_IgGt0",
  # "Baseline FHA IgG" = "FHA_IgGt0", 
  # "Baseline PRN IgG" = "PRN_IgGt0", 
  # "Baseline PT IgG" = "PT_IgGt0", 
  # "Baseline TT IgG" = "TT_IgGt0"
)

covariate.colors <- c(
  "arm_name" = "tomato",
  "birth_weight" = "lightblue",
  "infant_sex" = "forestgreen",
  "delivery_mode" = "#9467bd",
  "parity" = "#8c564b",
  "gravidity" = "firebrick",
  "gestational_age_vaccination" = "darkorange",
  "vaccine_birth_interval_days" = "steelblue",
  "gestational_age_birth" = "mediumseagreen",
  "maternal_age" = "salmon",
  "maternal_bmi" = "#FEE08B",
  "maternal_Hb" = "#C51B7D" 
  # "log_igg_t0" = "#AF8DC3",
  # "Residual" = "yellow",
  # "DT_IgGt0" = "#23AECE",
  # "FHA_IgGt0" = "#C51B7D", 
  # "PRN_IgGt0" = "#FEE08B", 
  # "PT_IgGt0" = "#5EA4A2", 
  # "TT_IgGt0" = "#E04C5C"
)

covar_list <- c("arm_name","infant_sex", "delivery_mode", "parity", "gravidity")
selected_covar <- 1

covar_cont_list <- c("birth_weight",
                    "gestational_age_vaccination",
                    "vaccine_birth_interval_days",
                    "gestational_age_birth",
                    "maternal_age", "log_igg_t0"
                     )
selected_covar_cont <- 1

covar_cat_list <- c("arm_name","infant_sex", "delivery_mode", "parity", "gravidity")
selected_covar_cat <- 1

igglist<-c("DT_IgG", "FHA_IgG", "PRN_IgG", "PT_IgG", "TT_IgG")

t0 <- "prevaccinated"
t1 <- "mo4"
t2 <- "vaccinated"
t3 <- "vaccinated9"

t0 <- "M02"
t1 <- "M04"
t2 <- "M05"
t3 <- "M09"
# visits <- c(t0,t1,t2)
visit_list <- c(t0,t1,t2,t3)

visit_label <- function(visit = "vaccinated") {
  case_when(
    visit == "M02" ~ "month 2",
    visit == "M04" ~ "month 4",
        visit == "M05" ~ "month 5",
    visit == "M09" ~ "month 9",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_  # optional: for cases that don't match
  )
}

visit_number <- function(visit = "vaccinated") {
  case_when(
    visit == "M02" ~ 2,
    visit == "M04" ~ 4,
    visit == "M05" ~ 5,
    visit == "M09" ~ 9
  )
}
            
# Helper function to convert p-values to significance labels
pvalue_to_label <- function(p) {
  if(p < 0.001) return("***")
  else if (p < 0.01) return("**")
  else if (p < 0.05) return("*")
  else return("ns")
}

tdiff1 <- "prevaccinated/vaccinated"
tfold1 <- "prevaccinated/vaccinated_fold"
tdiff2 <- "vaccinated9/vaccinated"
tfold2 <- "vaccinated/vaccinated9_fold"

antigen_list <- c("PT", "FHA", "PRN", "DT", "TT")
# analytelist<-c("ADCD", "ADCP", "ADNP","IgG", "IgG1", "IgG2", "IgG3", "IgG4","FcgR2a","FcgR3b")
# igglist<-c("DT_IgG", "gB_IgG","FHA_IgG", "PRN_IgG", "PT_IgG", "TT_IgG")
# fulligglist<-c("ELISA_PRN_IgG", "ELISA_FHA_IgG", "ELISA_PT_IgG", "PT_IgG", "PRN_IgG", "FHA_IgG", "TT_IgG", "DT_IgG", "gB_IgG")

# supervised_clusters = list(
#   c("IgG"),
#   c("IgG1"),
#   c("IgG2"),
#   c("IgG3"),
#   c("IgG4"),
#   c("FcgR2a"),
#   c("FcgR3b"),
#   c("ADCD"),
#   c("ADCP"),
#   c("ADNP")
# )

analytes_order <- c("IgG","IgG1","IgG2","IgG3","IgG4","FcgR2a","FcgR3b","ADCD","ADCP","ADNP")

arms <- c("TdaP", "TT")

refarms <- c("TT","TdaP")

# # start supervised cluster loop
# supervised_cluster_list <- c("SC_ADCD", "SC_ADNP", "SC_ADCP", "SC_FcgR2a", "SC_FcgR3b", "SC_IgG", "SC_IgG1", "SC_IgG3", "SC_IgG2","SC_IgG4")
# 
# 
# ## create a dataframe to loop over that contains the parameters needed
# loop_id <- 1:length(visits)
# visit_v <- visits
# cluster_v <- c("cluster","cluster", "cluster")
# title_v <- c(paste(manu, visits[1], sep = ": "), paste(manu, visits[2], sep = ": "), paste(manu, visits[3], sep = ": "))
# loop_frame <- data.frame(loop_id, visit_v, cluster_v, title_v)
# 
# cloop_name <- c("Antigen","Supervised","Unsupervised")
# cloop_var <- c("antigen_c","supervised_c","cluster")
# cloop_id <- 1:length(cloop_name)
# cloop_suffix <- c(" ","fc","us")
# cluster_frame <- data.frame(cloop_id, cloop_name, cloop_var, cloop_suffix)

# residual_pathname_tdap <- "./data/igg_standard_residuals_tdap_apwp_prevacvacc.RData"
# modelfit_pathname_tdap <- "./data/igg_standard_model_fit_tdap_apwp_prevacvacc.RData"
# residual_filename_tdap <- here("./data/igg_standard_residuals_tdap_apwp_prevacvacc.RData")
# modelfit_filename_tdap <- here("./data/igg_standard_model_fit_tdap_apwp_prevacvacc.RData")
# 
# residual_pathname_tt <- "./data/igg_standard_residuals_tt_apwp_prevacvacc.RData"
# modelfit_pathname_tt <- "./data/igg_standard_model_fit_tt_apwp_prevacvacc.RData"
# residual_filename_tt <- here("./data/igg_standard_residuals_tt_apwp_prevacvacc.RData")
# modelfit_filename_tt <- here("./data/igg_standard_model_fit_tt_apwp_prevacvacc.RData")

residual_pathname_ap <-"./data/igg_standard_residuals_ap_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData"
modelfit_pathname_ap <-"./data/igg_standard_model_fit_ap_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData"
residual_filename_ap <- here::here("./data/igg_standard_residuals_ap_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData")
modelfit_filename_ap <- here::here("./data/igg_standard_model_fit_ap_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData")

residual_pathname_wp <-"./data/igg_standard_residuals_wp_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData"
modelfit_pathname_wp <-"./data/igg_standard_model_fit_wp_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData"
residual_filename_wp <- here::here("./data/igg_standard_residuals_wp_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData")
modelfit_filename_wp <- here::here("./data/igg_standard_model_fit_wp_matpm_prevacvacc_k.RData")

```

```{r loaddata, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
#### load data
load(file = here("./data/a_set.RData"))
# data <- data[data$maternal_arm==selected_maternal_arm, ]
data$arm_name <- data$maternal_arm
# data$arm_name <- fct_recode(data$arm_name, "mTT" = "TT", "mTdaP" = "TdaP")

table(data$maternal_arm)
table(data$arm_name)
table(data$infant_arm)
table(data$visit_name)
table(data$feature)

## create a check across the two sets of total IgG
# 
# igg_data <- pivot_wider(data = data[data$feature %in% c("PT_IgG","PT_Total_IgG"), colnames(data) != "analyte"], names_from = "feature", values_from = "value_reported")
# 
# ggplot(data=igg_data, mapping = aes(x = PT_IgG, y = PT_Total_IgG)) +
#   geom_point()
# 
# 
# chka_set <- data[data$infant_arm=="wP" & data$feature == "PT_IgG" & data$visit_name == "prevaccinated",]
# ggplot(data=chka_set, mapping = aes(x = arm_name, y = value_reported)) +
#   geom_point()
# 
# chkb_set <- data[data$infant_arm=="wP" & data$feature == "PT_Total_IgG" & data$visit_name == "prevaccinated",]
# ggplot(data=chkb_set, mapping = aes(x = arm_name, y = value_reported)) +
#   geom_point()

data <- data[
    data$feature %in% include_feature 
    # & data$arm_name %in% arms 
    # & data$visit_name %in% visit_list
    , c("visit_name","subject_accession","antigen","arm_name", "analyte", "infant_arm", "feature","value_reported")]
data$feature <- droplevels(data$feature)
table(data$arm_name)
table(data$maternal_arm)
table(data$visit_name)
table(data$feature)

ddata <- distinct(data[data$feature %in% include_feature , c("infant_arm", "visit_name","subject_accession","antigen","arm_name", "analyte", "feature", "value_reported")], subject_accession, visit_name, feature, .keep_all = TRUE)

ddata$arm_name <- factor(ddata$arm_name)
table(ddata$arm_name)
ddata$arm_name <- relevel(ddata$arm_name, ref="TT")
table(ddata$arm_name)
data <- ddata
data <- data[data$arm_name %in% arms, ]
data <- data[data$visit_name %in% visit_list, ]

data$arm_name <- droplevels(data$arm_name)
data$visit_name <- droplevels(data$visit_name)
data$study_accession <- ifelse(data$arm_name %in% arms, "SDY2818", NA)
# names(check_assessment_wide)[names(check_assessment_wide) == "gestational_age_vaccination"] <- "gestational_age_at_vaccine"
# names(check_assessment_wide)[names(check_assessment_wide) == "gestational_age_birth"] <- "gestational_age_at_delivery"
# names(check_assessment_wide)[names(check_assessment_wide) == "infant_interval_between_vaccination_and_delivery_days"] <- "vaccine_birth_interval_days"
# names(check_assessment_wide)[names(check_assessment_wide) == "maternal_age"] <- "maternal_age_at_delivery"
# 
# data_clin <- dplyr::distinct(check_assessment_wide[ , c("study_accession","subject_accession", "birth_weight", "infant_sex", "delivery_mode", "parity", "gravidity", "gestational_age_at_vaccine", "vaccine_birth_interval_days", "gestational_age_at_delivery", "maternal_age_at_delivery")])
# data_clin$birth_weight <- as.numeric(data_clin$birth_weight)/1000
data$log_assay_value <- log10(data$value_reported+1)

```


```{r unstandardized_data, include=FALSE}
data_e <- data[data$feature %in% igglist
                 & data$visit_name==t0
                 # & data$antigen %in% antigenlist
               , c("subject_accession","antigen","value_reported","log_assay_value")]
# data_e$log_igg_t0 <- log2(data_e$value_reported + 1)
data_e$subject_accession <- droplevels(factor(data_e$subject_accession))
data_e$antigen <- droplevels(data_e$antigen)
names(data_e)[names(data_e) == "value_reported"] <-"igg_t0"
names(data_e)[names(data_e) == "log_assay_value"] <-"log_igg_t0"


data_es <- data_e[ , c("subject_accession", "antigen", "log_igg_t0")]
data_es$antigen <- paste(data_es$antigen, "IgGt0", sep = "_")
data_ee <- pivot_wider(data = data_es, names_from = antigen, values_from = log_igg_t0)

data <- data[data$feature %in% include_feature
             & data$arm_name %in% arms
             & data$visit_name %in% visit_list,
             c("visit_name","subject_accession","antigen", "analyte", "infant_arm","arm_name","feature","value_reported","log_assay_value")]

data$feature <- droplevels(data$feature)
data$antigen <- droplevels(data$antigen)
data$arm_name <- droplevels(data$arm_name)
data$visit_name <- droplevels(data$visit_name)

table(data$feature, data$antigen)
table(data$arm_name)
table(data$arm_name, data$visit_name)

# data <- merge(data, data_clin, by = "subject_accession", all.x = TRUE)
data <- merge(data, data_e, by = c("subject_accession", "antigen"), all.x = TRUE)
data <- merge(data, data_ee, by = c("subject_accession"), all.x = TRUE)

## drop extra arms in factor
data$arm_name <- droplevels(data$arm_name)
table(data$arm_name)

## relabel arm_name
data$arm_name <- relevel(data$arm_name, ref=as.character(refarms[1]))
arms <- levels(data$arm_name)
arm.short.color <- rev(arm.apwps.color)
arm.color = arm.short.color
table(data$arm_name)

data$log_assay_value <- log10(data$value_reported+1)

# data$study_accession <- factor(data$study_accession)
# data$subject_accession <- factor(data$subject_accession)
# data$analyte_reported <- str_split_i(data$feature, "_", 2)
# data$analyte_reported <- factor(data$analyte_reported)
# data$birth_weight <- as.numeric(data$birth_weight)
# data$infant_sex <- factor(data$infant_sex)
# data$parity <- ifelse(data$parity>0,1,0)
# data$parity <- factor(as.numeric(data$parity))
# data$gravidity <- ifelse(data$gravidity>1,2,1)
# data$gravidity <- factor(as.numeric(data$gravidity))
# data$delivery_mode <- factor(data$delivery_mode)
# data$gestational_age_at_vaccine <- as.numeric(data$gestational_age_at_vaccine)
# data$gestational_age_at_delivery <- as.numeric(data$gestational_age_at_delivery)
# data$maternal_age_at_delivery <- as.numeric(data$maternal_age_at_delivery)
# data$vaccine_birth_interval_days <- as.numeric(data$vaccine_birth_interval_days)
# data$log_igg_t0 <- as.numeric(data$log_igg_t0)

data <- as.data.frame(data)
unstandardized_data <- data
unstandardized_data$standstat <- "untransformed"
```


```{r standardized_data, include=FALSE}
standardized_data_wp <- standardized_set(standardized_analyte = "IgG",
                                      connection_data = data[data$infant_arm=="wP",],
                                      residual_file = residual_filename_wp
                                      )
standardized_data_ap <- standardized_set(standardized_analyte="IgG",
                                      connection_data = data[data$infant_arm=="aP",],
                                      residual_file=residual_filename_ap
                                      )
standardized_data <- rbind(standardized_data_wp, standardized_data_ap)

standardized_data$log_assay_value <- as.vector(scale(standardized_data$log_assay_value))

total_igg_data <- data %>%
  filter(grepl("IgG$", feature))
total_igg_data$log_assay_value <- as.vector(scale(total_igg_data$log_assay_value))
standardized_data = rbind(standardized_data[ , names(total_igg_data)], total_igg_data)

standardized_data$standstat <- "standardized"

standardized_data_no_total_igg =
standardized_data %>%
  filter(!grepl("IgG$", feature))
```


```{r assemble_unstandard_standardized, include=FALSE}
data <- rbind(unstandardized_data, standardized_data)
data$antigen_c <- data$antigen
data$analyte <- factor(str_split_i(as.character(data$feature),"_",2))
dxdata <- distinct(data, standstat, subject_accession, visit_name , feature, .keep_all = TRUE)
dxdata <- dxdata[!is.na(dxdata$value),]
dxdata$visit_number <- visit_number(dxdata$visit_name)
feature_d_names <- unique(dxdata$feature)
tdata <- pivot_wider(dxdata, id_cols = c("standstat","subject_accession", "visit_number" ,"visit_name"), names_from = "feature", values_from = "log_assay_value")

```

```{r trend_loops, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
for (standstat in c("untransformed","standardized")) {
    cat("\n\n")
    cat(paste("##", standstat, "{.tabset}", "\n\n"))
    for (visit in visit_list) {
      cat("\n\n")
      cat(paste("###", visit, "{.tabset}", "\n\n"))
      infant_arm_list <- c("wP", "aP")
        for (infant_arm in infant_arm_list) {
          cat("\n\n")
          cat(paste("####", infant_arm, "{.tabset}", "\n\n"))
          txdata <- dxdata[dxdata$standstat==standstat 
                           & dxdata$visit_name==visit
                           & dxdata$infant_arm==infant_arm,
                           c("subject_accession", "antigen", "analyte", "arm_name", "log_assay_value")
                           ]
          
          p<- volcano_plot_arm_effect(data = txdata,
                                      effect_label = c("Lower TdaP", "Higher TdaP"))
          
      cat("\n\n")
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n")
          
        } # end infant arm loop
    } # end visit loop
} # end standstat loop


```

```{r workflowr, include=FALSE}
## workflowr::wflow_build(files = here::here("./analysis/response_volcanos_matpm_v3.Rmd"))
```
